alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature in the dark.
cleavage agent: digested overnight using sequencing-grade endoproteinase GluC (Roche) at 25 °C.
collision energy: fragmented in the HCD cell at 28% collision energy.
fragmentation method: fragmented in the HCD cell at 28% collision energy.
instrument: analyzed on a Q Exactive HF or HF-X Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
ionization type: coupled via a ZSpray ESI source.
